title: The Banhammer
description: A Banhammer, but like, in Minecraft or something.
body:
# The Banhammer
This mod adds a Banhammer to Minecraft.
The purpose of the Banhammer is to be a very strong Creative Mode item, but can be crafted in survival.
It has 100 hits before it breaks with 250 attack damage.
This mod was made for a server by request of a friend.

# Support
This mod currently only supports Forge, since I'm not too good with fabric.
I do plan on expanding to NeoForge.
